response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive software development experience, including C++ (10+ years on Windows), SQL, and financial domain exposure (RIDE Capital in investment practices). However, her recent work heavily favors Node.js, TypeScript, and other non-C++ technologies, with no direct capital markets or fixed-income systems experience. Her consulting engagement model aligns with the role, but the lack of recent, relevant domain expertise and mismatch with core technical stack requirements make her a poor fit.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (10+ years, including Windows development)
Financial domain exposure (RIDE Capital, investment practices)
concerns: Minimal recent C++ development (focus on Node.js/TypeScript)
No direct capital markets or fixed-income systems experience
Domain expertise not aligned with fixed-income derivatives or investment banking
